original_text: Institutional investor activity reflects mixed sentiment following the earnings release. Ark Invest purchased $21.5 million in Airbnb stock, viewing the post-earnings decline as a buying opportunity (C089). Baron Capital also disclosed Q2 positions involving Airbnb alongside other real estate holdings (C087). The stock underperformed the broader market on August 11, 2025, despite the earnings beat (C074). Management's balance sheet remains solid with a current ratio of 1.23 as of Q2 2025, indicating adequate liquidity to fund strategic initiatives (K006).
revised_text: Institutional investor activity reflects mixed sentiment following the earnings release. Ark Invest purchased $21.5 million in Airbnb stock, viewing the post-earnings decline as a buying opportunity (C018). Baron Capital also disclosed Q2 positions involving Airbnb alongside other real estate holdings (C016). The stock underperformed the broader market on August 11, 2025, despite the earnings beat (C003, C005). Management's balance sheet remains solid with a current ratio of 1.23 as of Q2 2025, indicating adequate liquidity to fund strategic initiatives (K006).
changes_summary: Replaced invalid citations C089, C087, and C074 with valid evidence chunks C018, C016, and C003 respectively. Added C005 to support the 'earnings beat' claim within the stock performance sentence as C003 does not explicitly mention the beat. Verified all numerical data ($21.5 million, 1.23 ratio, August 11 date) against the provided evidence.
